name: argus-codex-computer-use
description: Use Argus as a local Codex MCP computer-use tool for Windows desktop automation.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Windows desktop apps from Codex through local MCP.
interface.longDescription: Argus exposes a Codex-specific MCP server for Windows desktop observation and input. It runs locally, does not call the OpenAI API, and does not require an OpenAI API key.
defaultPrompt: Use Argus to open Notepad and type a test message.
Use Argus to operate the current Windows app.
Use Argus to observe the desktop and click the target.
